overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring vibrant neon signage, elevated highway structures, and dense urban architecture. The character walks steadily through commercial districts, crossing intersections and passing various pedestrians and vehicles in a vividly colored, synthetic environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the massive elevated highway structure, passing digital billboards and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: woman in beige coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green and red building facade with circular Kiroshi logo and Japanese text signage
massive concrete overpass with thick support columns spanning the street
large curved digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
classic green sedan parked at the curb along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. The green Kiroshi building dominates the left side with large digital screens, while vintage cars park along the right curb. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with neon accents and concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and overhead signage

events.description: approaching and entering a wide street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk and beginning to cross the street intersection, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: man in red vest and dark pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: building facade with vibrant purple neon signage and glass entrance
suspended digital screens hanging from the elevated structure above the street
red pedestrian signal box with illuminated yellow walk figure

segments.scene_description: Walking past various storefronts with neon accents, the scene transitions toward a street intersection. The elevated highway structure shifts to the right as the camera approaches a crosswalk. Pedestrian density increases, and overhead digital signage becomes visible hanging from the infrastructure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with hotel and massive digital billboards

events.description: crossing the wide street intersection while vehicles wait at the traffic signal
entering a new street canyon with prominent curved hotel building and dense neon signage

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and turning slightly to follow the sidewalk toward the hotel building, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving along the street past the hotel

entered.detail: distinctive curved white building with large purple HOTEL signage and Japanese text
tall vertical digital display showing 08 and BW33 identifiers
massive digital billboard displaying a person in a purple jacket
small yellow three-wheeled compact vehicle driving along the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with a prominent curved hotel building featuring bright neon signage. The camera crosses the street among moderate traffic, passing a distinctive yellow micro car and large digital advertisements. The vertical tower displaying 08 serves as a landmark against the dense urban backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with tall glass towers and neon hotel signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the hotel and continuing down the street lined with tall buildings and shopfronts

entered.detail: high-rise building with grid-patterned glass windows rising above the street
vibrant pink structural columns and beams supporting building overhangs
ground-level commercial spaces with illuminated entrances and displays

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the street, the hotel building recedes to the left while a tall glass office tower dominates the right side. The environment features vibrant pink structural elements and ground-level shops. The elevated highway remains visible in the distance as the walk proceeds through the dense urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense cyberpunk district, moving from a sheltered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by walking past the green Kiroshi building and parked vintage cars under the concrete shadow of the highway. As the camera advances past neon-accented storefronts, the highway structure shifts to the right, opening the view toward a bustling crosswalk filled with pedestrians and overhead digital signage. The scene then expands into a wide intersection where the camera crosses the street among traffic and a yellow micro car, passing a curved hotel and a towering vertical display. Finally, the hotel recedes to the left as the path leads deeper into an urban canyon dominated by a tall glass office tower and vibrant pink structural elements.
